## Checklist

- [ ] `composer test` passes locally
- [ ] `vendor/bin/pint --dirty` is clean
- [ ] Tenant isolation not violated (no new un-scoped queries on tenant models)
- [ ] No secrets / real API keys / customer data added
- [ ] PROJECT.md updated if behavior changed
- [ ] Added a test for the fix / feature (or explained why not)
